items.label: e2e-author

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git diff --name-only $(git merge-base origin/project/pwa-kit HEAD)..HEAD -- apps/commerce-storefront | head -60
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git diff --name-only $(git merge-base origin/project/pwa-kit HEAD)..HEAD -- apps/commerce-storefront | grep -v 'in-progress/' | head -30

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && grep -rn 'category' overrides/app/routes.jsx config/default.js 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "---"; grep -rn '/category/' node_modules/@salesforce/re

cat > /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts << 'ENDOFFILE' ↵ import { test, expect, type Page, type Locator } from '@playwright/test'; ↵ /** ↵ * E2E tests for th
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && wc -l e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts && head -5 e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts && echo "---" && tail -5 e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts 2>&1 | head -30
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck e2e/product-quick-view.spec.ts 2>&1 | head -10

messages: Now let me examine the actual component implementations and find the data-testid attributes:
Now let me check the Playwright config and understand the test setup:
Good. Now I have all the information I need to write comprehensive E2E tests. Let me create the test file:
Now let me run the self-review gate to check for banned patterns:
No banned patterns found. Let me also verify the test file was created correctly:
Good. Now let me verify the TypeScript compiles correctly by checking syntax:
Those are all `node_modules/@types/node` errors, not from our file. The test file itself has no TypeScript errors. Let me verify no errors from our file specifically:
